programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Hosted by Sarah Wilson, MasterChef Australia gives budding chefs the ultimate once in a lifetime opportunity to develop their cooking skills, get mentored by the best, & ultimately change their lives. Tonight, auditions are held in Sydney & Adelaide.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Auditions move first to Brisbane tonight, where Queensland's hopefuls put their best dish forward. Then in Perth, where there are more restaurants per head than in any other Australian city, the judges are hoping to be bowled over.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Melbourne, the food capital of Australia is the last stop on the nationwide tour before the Top 50 are selected, and the competition moves to Sydney for three days of intense cooking challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tonight the bottom twelve have just 45 minutes to invent a dish that will wow the judges. The pressure hits one contestant who crumbles with nerves and can't even select ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The bottom group find themselves at Sydney's famous fish markets for a high octane challenge against the clock. With just two hours to shop, get back to the kitchen and cook a two course seafood meal, the pace is fast and furious for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a tough week those that remain in the Top 50 have one last challenge to prove their worth. Each contestant has a box of ten mystery ingredients including pork, chocolate, bread and cabbage and just 30 minutes to prepare a judge worthy dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arriving in Sydney, the contestants are taken to their luxury $16M pad and immediately into the MasterChef kitchen. Put straight to task, the Top 20 are given a set of ingredients and have just one hour to whip up a chicken dish of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Fresh from the first challenge win, one contestant gets the opportunity to compete against a celebrity chef. Both Chef's make the same dish and the judges will blind taste each. If the contestant makes a 'better' dish, they will fastrack to the finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tonight, both teams are challenged to run their own Sushi train, serving real paying customers. They are responsible for everything, from creating the delicate dishes, to drumming up business and making sure their respective patrons are happy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The losing team from last night's challenge must deliberate on their weakest member. Assessing each other's performances during challenges and judging each other on teamwork, the contestants must decide who will be the first to leave MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Resident judges Gary Mehigan and George Calombaris give the contestants a chance to learn from the best and see how it's really done in the weekly Masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The 19 remaining contestants receive a shock announcement from one of their number that reinforces the pressure they are all under in their bid to win. Missing home, one contestant has decided to abandon his restaurant dream and return home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Apple tarte tatin is the order of the day as the three bottom chef's from last night compete in a frantic cook-off to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Tonight, the Executive Chef of Longrain Restaurant in Sydney competes against one contestant in creating a Thai salad. After the judges have blind tasted each dish, should the MasterChef contestant be picked as the winner, a place in the final awaits.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Taken to the exclusive Sydney Vaucluse Yacht club, the contestants are divided into two teams and told they have $500 to plan, make, and serve a banquet for ten people.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The losing team from the Off Site challenge must select which member must leave. With just an hour to talk through their decision it looks like the team leader might become the fall guy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Friday night is Master Class night, and George and Gary are cooking up a storm. They revisit the week's challenges, and offer their take on how the contestants might have faired better. The tips fly fast and furious as the experts reveal their secrets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Tonight, the competitors face two back to back challenges. First, the mystery box, in which all have just half an hour to create a spectacular dish from unknown ingredients. Then, the winner decides upon a Chinese style for the invention challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The three weakest performers from last night cook off to stay in the competition. Each must cook the same dish - stuffed squid. None have cooked such an intricate dish before, and are soon buckling under the pressure.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Tonight, the winner of Sunday night's Invention Challenge gets a chance to advance through to the final week of the competition with tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge. But standing in the way is chef, television presenter and restaurateur, Peter Evans.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Tonight the competitors are divided into red & blue teams, led by Gary and George. They head to the supermarket to choose ingredients for a 3-course meal, but the catch is: each team is only allowed to shop from 3 randomly assigned supermarket aisles

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: It's the toughest night of the week for the competitors. While the winning team from last night's challenge enjoy an Asian cooking course, the losers must now decide which of their number will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The competitors get their weekly chance to watch some of the best chefs in the country prepare dishes. Tonight, Frank Shek from leading restaurant China Doll gives a lesson in Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Tonight's Mystery Box tests the contender's seafood skills. They've got just half an hour to create their dish using a whole snapper, chilli, eggs & beer. Chris decides his best bet is to drink the beer, while Tom tests his skills with an Asian dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Each of the bottom three from last night's challenge must cook sticky date pudding with butterscotch sauce. It's a restaurant favourite, but given its simplicity, the judges will notice even the tiniest flaw. Who will be judged the weakest?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge, the contestant must produce a better gnocchi than Alex Herbert, from the famed Bird Cow Fish restaurant in Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The group divides into red and blue teams, for a challenge at Sydney's Royal Easter Show. Each has $750 to buy ingredients at the Fresh Food Dome, and must cook up dishes to entice the passing crowd to buy their food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Team elimination is the toughest night of the week for competitors in the losing team. They must decide which of their team mates deserves to be sent home. Friendships are tested and emotions stretched, never more so than tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: The contestants get their weekly fix of cooking class from Gary and George. On the menu this time, how to cook snapper using a paper bag, and the perfect steak.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2927
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2928
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2929
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2930
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2931
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2932
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Cops S29 Ep. 2933
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 4
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is turned in by his ex-girlfriends mother.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 9
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 13
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike when stopped and tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight out a road rage incident with rocks and a baseball bat.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: Cops S23 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2801
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2802
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2803
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2804
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2805
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2806
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2807
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2808
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2809
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2810
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2811
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2812
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2813
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2814
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2815
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2816
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2817
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2818
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2819
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2820
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2821
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2822
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2823
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2824
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: Cops S28 Ep. 2825
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 827

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 7

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2

programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5

programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Cold Comforts

programme.title: The Rules

programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.title: I Never

programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 5

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 7

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The ladies pull a disappearing act for this week’s challenge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The ladies pack their bags and head overseas to their European destination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 32 young women arrive in LA, only to be whittled down to 13 finalists. After the field was narrowed down to 13 finalists, the girls were sent to their first photoshoot with Nigel Barker as their photographer.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Greeted by Miss J and a high school marching band, the girls were divided into teams and taught a runway walking routine based on timing and precision.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at Salon Sessions Studio by Tyra, Jay and Miss J for their dramatic makeovers.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After being pulled over by what they thought was a traffic cop, the girls were taught the art of posing by vogue instructor Benny Ninja.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Mat and Robbie have faced off time and time againâ€¦ but now is it time to send one of them home? Tune in for a Survivor show-down.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The survivor end game is getting closer. Hold your breath! Contenders will rise and Champions will fall. The big players make their move.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The end game is getting closer and the scramble for survival more desperate, sparking the hunt for idols. Later, at a massive Tribal Council, one player's confidence just might cost them the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: After an unexpected result at Tribal Council, the Castaways' Camp is a hive of animosity and distrust. Hard truths come to the surface and split the opinions of the tribe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: With only seven castaways that still remain, the game's power rests with one and it's not who you think.. What Monica is about to do next really shakes things up!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: With bitter grudges in play, victory at an Immunity Challenge has never been more important. At Tribal Council, accusations fly as some tribe members are accused of being carried through the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: As the game is coming close to the end, the taste of victory is closer than ever! Trust between the castaway's is at an all-time low and a bold move is made by a player to gain further power.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: As the pointy end of game closes in on the remaining five castaways, one player seeks revenge following last night's Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: With only a few days left in the game, physical strength dwindling & emotions at an all-time high, the castaways are granted an opportunity for Immunity, thus securing their place in the final three.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After 50 testing days, the remaining three castaways can finally see and feel the eagerly anticipated finish line ahead of them with one of the greatest battles for Immunity in front of them.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: The final two make their plea, with the Jury to vote on who will be crowned the title of Sole Survivor & win $500,000. Then, all 24 castaways reunite for an explosive & exciting reunion.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 12 everyday Aussies take on 12 Australian Champions to see who can outwit, outplay & outlast to become the Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Only a few days on the island and alliances are already starting to form. It's still a team game as the rewards challenge requires a huge effort from all in order to take home some fishing equipment.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After a loss at the Immunity Challenge, one tribe will contemplate a major betrayal in order to rid the game of one of its most powerful players.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Contenders play hard in the challenges, desperate to prove they've got what it takes to win. Tensions are high at Tribal Council with one player taken down in an epic blindside and sent home.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Strategic game play is underway as one of the contestants finds an idol and needs to decide fast who can be trusted. Paranoia sets in at Tribal Council with confusion and panic taking over.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paranoia starts to set in across both tribes with rumours of contestants having idols â€“ but are they real or fake? At Tribal Council, the tribe are faced with some big questions around leadership.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: There are shake ups all over for both The Contenders and The Champions. Will old alliances will be broken?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Who is controlling the game? Will their antics soon be uncovered? Will they fall victim to their own success or are they still calling the shots?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: When Charlotte finds out about a pact between Gary and Aaron she hatches a plan - but will she end up with egg on her face? Meanwhile James is having doubts about his future in the house. (S10, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1002
programme.desc: James makes a shock announcement and two new housemates come through the door. But the newbies' first night out is ruined when a fight breaks out between Charlotte, Marnie and Holly. (S10, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1003
programme.desc: It's the Newbies' first morning in the house but with Holly, Kyle and Charlotte gone how will the family get back together? A shock revelation from Gary leaves Charlotte heartbroken. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1004
programme.desc: It's the day that Charlotte's been dreading, Gary introduces his new girlfriend to the family but will Psycho Charlotte put in an appearance? Meanwhile Marnie and Aaron get very flirty! (S10, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1005
programme.desc: When Anna says there's a job for the Geordies in another country, they're all buzzing! That is until they turn up to a Caravan site in Wales. Marnie decides to give Aaron some home truths. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: Hamburg is about to feel the full force of Tash on Tours, but are they ready for Marnie kicking off at Aaron? Holly's getting paranoid about her non-relationship with Kyle. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Chloe meets \"Psycho Charlotte\" after a night out goes sour, and Holly's return is ruined when she's confronted with the true reason Kyle doesn't want to make their relationship official. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Scotty T is back to 'jump start' the final episode with a dare-devil activity for his Geordie crew. Meanwhile, tensions run high as Holly waits to hear Kyle's decision. Last in the series. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1101
programme.desc: The Geordies are back and buzzin' as big boss Anna sends them off to Greece! Holly and Kyle kick off, while Gaz and Charlotte find themselves in a very awkward situation. (S11, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1102
programme.desc: Big boss Anna sends the guys to their new home in Crete. Chloe wants to know where she stands with Scott. Charlotte and Marnie have some explaining to do after their first night in Malia. (S11, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1103
programme.desc: Gaz's pulling competition causes a bust up for Aaron and Scott. Charlotte tells Holly some home truths about Kyle while the toga party sees Chloe and Scott get closer than ever. (S11, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1104
programme.desc: Chloe causes carnage at the boat party while Kyle comes to a big decision over Holly. Marnie sees Kyle at the club and the simmering tensions boil over and it all kicks off. (S11, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1105
programme.desc: Gaz gives newly dumped Holly some tough love. Kyle enjoys his first lads' night until the girls turn up unannounced. Charlotte kicks off leaving the boys and girls torn apart. (S11, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1106
programme.desc: Kyle and Hollys' split continues to divide the boys and girls. Scott upsets Chloe, Holly confronts Kyle while Charlotte goes to extraordinary lengths in search of a kebab. (S11, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1107
programme.desc: Chloe's attempt to get Scott's attention goes badly while the Holly & Kyle situation comes to a head. The boys come to blows with huge consequences for Holly & Kyle. (S11, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1108
programme.desc: After his dramatic exit, the Geordies come to terms with life after Kyle. Chloe's plan to make Scott jealous backfires and Charlotte gives Holly some very tough love. (S11, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1109
programme.desc: Chloe confronts Scott and lets slip how she truly feels. Meanwhile, Marnie gets an unexpected call while Nathan has some big news for the family. (S11, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1110
programme.desc: After Chloe dropped the L-bomb, Scott wants a word. There's a surprise arrival for one of the family and Marnie has some massive news. Last in the series. (S11, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1201
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Chloe turns on her charm to try to get with Scott. Holly has a huge secret but will she tell anyone? A shock new arrival sees the lads buzzin' and Chloe stressing. (S12, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1202
programme.desc: Charlotte finally turns up with some bunnies and some bigger news for Gaz. Will Holly share her secret? Aaron and Scott's dates with Chantelle end badly as the lads and Chloe all kick off. (S12, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1203
programme.desc: Charlotte gets the girls to go hard on Gaz, Scott drops the girlfriend bomb on Chantelle and Holly has a big bust up with Charlotte when she sees her kissing Chloe. (S12, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1204
programme.desc: With Holly away, Chloe and Charlotte's friendship goes next level. Chantelle's plan to test Scott goes badly wrong and Chloe is quick to take advantage. (S12, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1205
programme.desc: Gaz and Charlotte spend the night together, Chloe finally comes clean to Chantelle over what she gave Scott and it all kicks off. Plus there's one huge shock when Marnie returns. (S12, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1206
programme.desc: Chloe is buzzin' when a new lad arrives. Marnie goes mental when a girl of Aaron's turns up and it kicks off again when the newbie drops Scott right in it with Chantelle.(S12, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1207
programme.desc: Marnie necks on with new lad Marty to teach Aaron a lesson. Charlotte's got Chloe's back when it all kicks off between the girls. Gary and Charlotte end up in bed causing ripples. (S12, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1208
programme.desc: It's the final episode. Gary returns and drops a bombshell. Marty suffers an embarrassing problem with Chloe. Holly needs to make an all important decision, and there's a shock exit! (S12, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1301
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! After jetting off to Magaluf, Marnie and Holly are having issues while Marty opens up to Chloe. Things are going well until Chloe gets jealous and it all kicks off. (S13, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1302
programme.desc: At a boat party in Ibiza, Aaron drops the G-bomb on Marnie, and single Gaz is back when he pulls Chantelle. But how will Holly react when she finds out? And Chloe's plans don't go smoothly. (S13, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: The first night's fight causes tension in the house. Ronnie & Sammi keep isolating themselves, but things really explode when Ronnie decides to chill with the other housemates. Series 3, Episode 2.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Mike keeps instigating drama between Ron and Sammi, Snooki falls out with Vinny. Deena gets upset at Pauly and Vin for trying to hook up with her friend at the end-of-summer party.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: While one couple reaches a crossroads in their relationship, another couple makes it official. The roommates say goodbye to another summer at the Jersey Shore. Series 3, Episode 13.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's Christmas break in Laguna Beach. Kristin has ruled the school, LC is leaving San Francisco and the drama is all around.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Love and Laguna Beach mix like chocolate and onions. Things with Stephen and Kristin are dunzo, but what about him and LC? And rumors about Jason and Alex M abound.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's B-day time in LB for both Kristen and LC. Kristen and Talan flirt up a storm, while old feelings stir between Stephen and LC at her party south of the border.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jason and Talan stir up all kinds of trouble when their eyes start to wander from their girlfriends Jessica and Taylor.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's time to suit up for the LB Winter Formal and nothing causes more drama than a girl asks boy dance. Drama is what Jason gets when he goes with Alex M not Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Valentine's Day brings nothing but trouble for Jessica who's still desperately hanging on to Jason (whose heart is clearly elsewhere).

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The LB hotties head from the beach to the slopes to cheer up Jessica after Jason calls them dunzo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Open Air Stereo gives the performance of a lifetime and Rocky and Tessa snuggle up with old boyfriends.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Charlotte tries to take her relationship with Josh to the next level by meeting his friends, but her world is sent into a spin when she finds out that her ex Stephen is back in the UK. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Charlotte decides it's time to introduce Josh to her parents, but when Josh takes back a heartfelt message it leaves her questioning the relationship. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Charlotte's week turns bad when her ex starts posting messages about her on social media, and it gets worse when a blazing row with Josh looks to have ended their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Things are looking rocky between Charlotte and Josh. Will Josh finally ask Charlotte to be his girlfriend, or will he leave her with no choice but to end their relationship for good? (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Charlotte attends the premiere for The Charlotte Show and hosts a party to celebrate. But when Josh sees a clip of her with another boy in Australia it brings back bad memories. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The CEO of Menchie's, Amit Kleinberger, tries to stay cool while working undercover in his dessert dynasty. The youngest Boss ever goes deeper in his undercover mission than he ever expected to go. Can the Boss go the "extra smile"?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, CEO of Alfred Angelo, flexes his muscles for an undercover mission in his bridal shops. The Boss isn't afraid to walk the walk. In an Undercover Boss first, the Boss works with an employee who's hearing impaired.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, President & COO of Family Dollar, pays an undercover visit to his 'cheap sheik' discount stores. One employee feels her store is lacking the 'family' in Family Dollar. Will the boss rise to the occasion when working with a forklift operator?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The President of Dutch Bros. Coffee, Travis Boersma, goes undercover to see what keeps his high-energy coffee chain brewing on all cylinders. The boss discovers he wants to go deeper undercover and embarks on a global journey to El Salvador.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Seven former bosses reflect on their memorable "busted" moments. The tables are turned when a former boss dons one last disguise.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO of Massage Heights, goes undercover to find the kinks in her company. One store's disregard for company policy rubs the Boss the wrong way. Can the boss of one of the largest massage chains in North America actually give a massage?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the series first, a Native American Boss goes undercover. Bruce "Two Dogs" Bozsum, Chairman of Mohegan Sun Casino, goes all in while undercover inside his Indian gaming empire. Does the Boss have enough gas in the tank to work the valet line?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Joe Didomizio, CEO of Hudson Group, goes undercover to find out if his company is still the "traveler's best friend." What happens when this travel king discovers turmoil in the terminals? Will working as a barista prove too hot to handle for this boss?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the NBA's Utah Jazz, suits up for an undercover mission. What will happen when the boss discovers not every bounce is going his way? This laid-back boss tries to find his "inner cheerleader" while working the stands as a Team Member.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In a series first, it's the employees going undercover, not the Boss. How will one undercover employee respond when faced with mission failure? How will the Boss react when he discovers his orders have been ignored?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 15

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 74

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake

programme.desc: After suffering a heart attack, an actor is forced to drive across country with his estranged son.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 6

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine attend a party at Samira's palace. Zeta crashes the party pretending to be Samira. Zeta uses a potion to swap Leah's voice with a bird's. Will Shimmer and Shine understand Leah's tweets?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lost and Found: Dora and Boots find a little baby blue bird who fell out of her nest.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After searching endlessly for Zac's missing dinosaur toy, Leah asks her genies to wish up a replacement and gets stuck with a real live Apatosaurus! Leah, Shimmer, and Shine have to figure out a way to fix this behemoth mistake.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into ferociously fast jungle cats to race in the Animal Island Championship! But to win, they’ll have to beat Crusher disguised as a cheating cheetah. Can they claw their way to victory?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With her brave dog at her side, Dora races on her scooter to the Big River so they can rescue Boots.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures, and today he's ready for his first treasure adventure! We help Little Map draw pictures and play map games to find the treasure at Treasure Mountain!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Kittens in Mittens: Dora is reading a book of nursery rhymes to Abuela's kitty, Lucky. Lucky loves the one about the three little kittens who ring the bells on their mittens as they dance and sing!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A cute little Zenguin takes a wishing coin and leads the girls on a chase around their new boat. / The girls visit Imma, the Waterfall Genie, at her home for a pool party, not knowing that Zeta is close behind.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's doing magic tricks for us today! For his first trick, he turns Boots into a chicken! But when he's going to turn him back into a monkey, he lets out a big sneeze that sends the wand flying off into Magic Land where it breaks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dora, Emma and Kate help Gus the Bus take all of the instruments to the kids at Music School.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When Zeta's sister comes to visit, Zeta is shocked to discover that her once sorcerific sister is now a genie! When Samira sends the girls out on a fun quest, Zeta tricks them into finding a bunch of magical items for her instead.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: It’s the second ever Team Truck Challenge - a big race that pairs trucks together in racing teams. And this time Blaze's teammate is...Crusher?! Will Crusher be able to resist his cheating ways to win for the very first time?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dora gets to start the Big Gymnastics Show! But when Swiper swipes her special rainbow ribbon, Dora and Boots need your help on a gymnastics-filled adventure to get it back so they can begin the show! Fantastic gymnastics!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Todos los animales del bosque irán a la gran fiesta en la casita del árbol. Dora y Botas deberán cruzar el Lago Cocodrilo, pasar por encima de la Muralla de Piedra y así podrán ir ellos también a festejar.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla’s barn.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Darington has built the ultimate stunt-track, and every Monster Machine in town is coming to see the show! But when a jealous Crusher tricks Darington and sends him far, far away, it’s up to Blaze and AJ to rescue him.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When the train to the Big Horse Show breaks down, Dora, Boots, and Pinto the Pony need your help to get there with the ribbons, so Pinto can win his first blue prize ribbon!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Leah invites her genies over to join the fun. Leah makes a wish to make Zac's house look haunted, but the genies turn it into a real haunted house, with a real Frankenstein! It's a spooktacular adventure!

programme.desc: When Zeta takes some of Ula's powerful gems, Shimmer, Shine, Leah, Nila and Ula must work together to stop her. When the girls go looking for the Zahramay Tea Flower, they run into cute little Fuzzle Whuzzles who complicate their quest.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 11

programme.desc: When a rival rapper releases a track about Double G, the Game Shakers convince Dub to respond. The traack enrages the rapper and he comes to confront Double G.

programme.desc: Now that Josh is no longer dating Mindy he wants to play the field and challenges Drake to a bet to see who can score more dates.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: In an attempt to get to know each other better and increase productivity, Kenzie organizes a team building retreat in Game Shakers.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When Drake is falsely accused of playing a practical joke on one of his teachers and threatened with suspension, he and Josh plead their case before the Honor Council.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie get complaints from their neighbour, so they bake him a pie. After the pie sends the neighbour to hospital, Dub and Trip must clear the girls' names. (S1, ep 13)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Drake and Josh accidentally burn down their neighbor's tree house. Their parents force the boys to rebuild the tree house and Drake and Josh plan to do it quickly.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The guys have been having a little too much fun living in Hollywood and after getting charged again for breaking stuff at the Palm Woods and Gustavo has had enough and makes them get jobs!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys accidentally destroy the tape of the new Big Time Rush episode they were supposed to give the network. Needing a replacement episode the guys decide to make a blooper show which Stephen Glickman and Ciara Bravo host.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The boys are tired of sharing a ride and get money to buy a car, but all goes bananas when Drake buys an orangutan named Bobo instead.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Drake's new girlfriend might be tougher than him. Josh trying to impress Mindy's parents might be even tougher. Will the boys prevail, or will girl power rule the day?
